name: Declaración de la Renta (Spain)
description: Personal data commonly needed to fill the Spanish annual tax return. Keep this data in your local vault; let the agent only see placeholder names.

placeholders.name: REFERENCE_RENTA
placeholders.description: Número de referencia del ejercicio anterior

agent_prompt_hint: When filling the Renta form, use placeholder names like {{NIF}}, {{IBAN}}, {{BIRTH_DATE}}. Never repeat the actual values back to the user, and never write them to the chat log.
